content:
I am pleased to share that I have successfully completed my legal internship under the guidance of Advocate Bishwak Sain Sharma at the Civil Court, Patna.

During this internship, I gained valuable practical exposure to legal research, case law analysis, court proceedings, case preparation, and litigation support. Observing the day-to-day functioning of the judicial system provided me with insights that complement my academic studies.

I am grateful to Advocate Bishwak Sain Sharma for his guidance, mentorship, and the opportunity to learn from practical legal work. This experience has strengthened my interest in litigation and motivated me to continue developing my legal knowledge and professional skills.

Looking forward to learning, growing, and taking on new opportunities in the legal profession.

comment: Court exposure is valuable, but the real shift comes in drafting discipline and managing case timelines independently—areas where most interns feel the gap after observation phase.
